comments: There are no totally correct entries for last Friday Night Connection but Tommy uses the connection of the nearest correct entry but they don't get a £12 record token for their efforts! They do get a couple of ZZ Top sweatshirts which were sent in to the show that day.
Tony Wilson was in the Maida Vale studios with Bernie Marsden's new band Alaska.

sessions.artist: Pendragon recorded 1983-11-11 for Friday Rock Show
